title: StarHUDForged
body:
# ✨ Welcome to StarHUDForged! ✨ The sleek, modern interface you've been waiting for has now arrived on Forge.
Have you ever gazed upon the original [StarHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/starhud) and wished you could bring its minimalist and highly polished interface to your Forge modpack? StarHUD revolutionizes your gameplay by replacing the default Minecraft HUD with a clean, modern, and space-inspired design that keeps you informed without cluttering your screen. No longer must you choose between your favorite Forge mods and a superior visual experience. ### **The wait is over.** **StarHUDForged** is an unofficial port that brings all the features you love from the original Fabric mod to the Forge ecosystem.
> This port was made possible by the incredible work of the original author, [Finside](https://modrinth.com/user/Finside), who designed and created the brilliant StarHUD. All credit for the concept and design goes to them.
--- ### **⚠️ CRITICAL NOTICE ⚠️** This is an **UNOFFICIAL** port. **DO NOT, under any circumstances, report issues or bugs from this version to the original author.** All support requests and issue reports must be directed to the [StarHUDForged](https://github.com/sj-hub9796/StarHud-Forged/issues) project page. --- **Currently Supported Version:** `1.20.1`
